title: Kaido Falls From the Sky
description: Kaido’s terrifying introduction widens the world beyond Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 0–5, Rebecca, Dressrosa Citizens, Marines, Straw Hat Pirates, Luffy deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Raw Clean: Bubble-Clean, Redrawer: I 'ypester: I ranslator: Editor:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Night- Time gambling in dress- Rosa...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that is what we decided, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In that case, he's won this one... We shall not capture him tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ISSHOU-SAN!! We've been running all over the country and finally found where he is!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: And after you told off the fleet Admiral so harshly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If we're going to take law and straw-hat's heads, this is our chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Keeps yammering on after the die has rolled... you're a disgrace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: At the very least, we want to say thanks....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: All of this is already causing a stir across the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: To us, they are simply saviors.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy, and his crew aren't in the palace?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Oh... them. They're together. They'll probably poke their heads in here tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: More importantly, Rebecca... if I'm going to return to the throne...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You're going to be princess, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: The next day, the new world, the sunny (swirlystraw crew's side)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Just when I thought we finally lost big mom's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Why do we have to go jumping right back into trouble?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It would have been better if we'd just stayed quietly on the ship! But you just had to run on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Shut up and do what I say!!! Are you gonna follow orders!? or do you want your heart crushed!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Landing here was the right thing to do!!! We can still save them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: hurry up...? you're telling me to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I will never forgive you if everyone dies!!! So hurry up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This ground is so hard to run on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Yohoho, we're in a fix!! We got separated from the others, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Distracted by that mysterious little girl...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: So it ends here, in- vaders!!? What did you do with her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Answer me!! Why have you come to this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: The eruption rain is coming! Get down!!!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
